title: How does it
subtitle: Three steps — from registration to your first collaborative project.

steps.title: Introduce yourself
steps.description: Choose a role, showcase your work — and let others find you first.

steps.title: Find your people
steps.description: Photographer, model, stylist — everyone is here. One search — and your team is ready.

steps.title: From idea to result
steps.description: Communicate, agree, and create. No unnecessary steps.
